name: Luscious Almond Cheesecake (Overnight)
recipeIngredient: 4 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine crushed wafers, finely chopped almonds, and sugar. Add the melted butter and mix well.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of an ungreased 10-inch springform pan. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the softened cream cheese and sugar until creamy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Incorporate extracts.
5. Pour the batter into the crust.
6. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes or until the center is almost set. Turn off the heat.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes.
8. Combine sour cream, sugar, and vanilla extract in a separate bowl.
9. Spread the mixture over the filling.
10. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Cool on a wire rack; chill overnight.
12. Just before serving, sprinkle with toasted sliced almonds and remove the sides of the pan. Store in the refrigerator.
